notes.d07: Catalog tools are asserted separately; the original seven remain a subset, not a cap.
notes.response_contracts: Each legacy tool binds its exposed output schema to an existing deterministic fake-backed test; get_status also has a direct no-live response assertion.
notes.secrets: No credentials, tokens, payload bodies, descriptions, titles, source locations, or ordering metadata.

provenance.generation_rule: FastMCP list_tools schemas plus inspect.signature; recursively remove only title/description metadata and sort mapping keys/scalar enum lists
provenance.source: pre-Phase-5 FastMCP registration at Phase 5 execution base
